summary: Nuno role-search expanded from 32 employers to 110, with largest buckets being ops, sales, hotel, and qc.
JSON-array-salvage pattern for truncated airouter responses
Stage-then-zip pattern for OneDrive trees with Office files possibly open, copying each source file to $env:TEMP staging and then zipping using [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::CreateFromDirectory.
Delivered Nuno job-hunt pack v2 (zip 650558 B, 30 entries) replacing v1. Delta includes nuno-roles-expanded.xlsx and missed 3 entries due to open files.
